'''Abbaji''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was mostly composed of [[Tree/Legends|rainforests]], including the [[Irugian Rain Forest]], the only place in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] where [[firethorn tree]]s could be found. One of those such [[Tree/Legends|trees]] was given to the renowned criminal [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], leader of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate.

==Description==
Abbaji was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SE" /> in the [[Abbaji system/Legends|Abbaji system]] of the [[Spar sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a subsector within the inner region of the [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]], in the remote [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAMS" /> The famous hundred-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-tall [[firethorn tree]]s were unique to the planet and only grew in a single grove of the world's [[Irugian Rain Forest]].<ref name="SE" />

The planet's surface was mostly composed of rainforests, while its [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was [[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|breathable]] to most [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
At some [[Time/Legends|point]], [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], head of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization, was given a six-hundred-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old dwarf firethorn [[Tree/Legends|tree]] as a peace offering by a [[Unidentified Xizor's business rival|business rival]], a gift that Xizor considered to be one of his most prized possessions.<ref name="CSWE" /> In the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era, the world's security rested primarily in the [[Abbaji System Constables]], a local military and [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]].<ref name="RftT">{{GamerCite|9|Race for the Tessent}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Abbaji was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], which was written by [[Steve Perry]].

In [[2006]], a new [[Abbaji (Kalee system)|Abbaji]] was introduced to ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], with ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placing it and the planet [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]] in the same system, according to ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]''. However, ''Shadows of the Empire'' had placed the first planet known as Abbaji near the planet [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], and so, due to this mistake, the latter Abbaji near Kalee was unofficially [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] as Abbaji Minor by author [[Jason Fry]].<ref name="Fry">{{JCFCite|url=posts/31279316|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2010-09-27|time=8:19 am|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180314051039/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-152}}</ref>
